description: Cap vitest concurrency to 3 files × 3 cases (max 9 simultaneous test cases) and add fallback XRPL node wss://testnet.xrpl-labs.com/ with automatic retry on TimeoutError.

userStories.title: Cap vitest file and test-case concurrency
userStories.description: As a developer, I want vitest to run at most 3 files and 3 test cases concurrently so that the testnet node is not overwhelmed.
acceptanceCriteria: In vitest.config.ts, add `poolOptions: { forks: { maxForks: 3 } }` inside the test config block
In vitest.config.ts, add `maxConcurrency: 3` inside the test config block
userStories.notes: poolOptions.forks.maxForks limits concurrent test files (worker processes). maxConcurrency limits concurrent it.concurrent cases within a single file. Together: 3 × 3 = 9 max simultaneous test cases.

userStories.title: Fallback XRPL node on timeout errors in fund.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the test helper to automatically retry on a fallback XRPL node when the primary node times out, so that transient congestion errors don't fail tests.
acceptanceCriteria: In fundMaster: wrap the faucet HTTP call and submitAndWait in try/catch; if error message contains "Timeout", retry once using FAUCET_URL_FALLBACK and a fresh Client connected to XRPL_WS_FALLBACK; if fallback also throws, rethrow original error
In initTicketPool: wrap submitAndWait in try/catch; if error message contains "Timeout", retry once using a fresh Client connected to XRPL_WS_FALLBACK; if fallback also throws, rethrow original error

In createFunded: wrap each payment submitAndWait in try/catch; if error message contains "Timeout", retry once using a fresh Client connected to XRPL_WS_FALLBACK; if fallback also throws, rethrow original error
Fallback Client must be freshly created, connected before use, and disconnected after the retry attempt in a finally block
No changes to any test files — retry logic lives entirely in fund.ts
userStories.notes: TimeoutError from xrpl.js has message matching 'Timeout for request'. Only retry on timeout — do not catch tecNO_PERMISSION, temBAD_FEE, or other XRPL error codes. The fallback client is ephemeral: connect, use, disconnect.
